title: Retroperitoneal structures 2
body_html:

Image sourced from Wikipedia
Note the posterior aspect of this diagram (the vertebral column has been removed) showing the retroperitoneal structures, including the ascending/descending colon, kidneys, ureters and great vessels. The duodenum (2nd, 3rd, 4th parts) and pancreas are not well demonstrated here.
